notes: Refers to a pleasant smell, often of flowers, perfume, or food.

sentences.german: Der Duft der Rosen füllt den ganzen Garten.
sentences.english: The scent of the roses fills the entire garden.

sentences.german: Ich liebe den Duft von frisch gebackenem Brot.
sentences.english: I love the aroma of freshly baked bread.
